factor_description: Past 20-trading-day cumulative close-to-close return without skipping recent days.

metadata.source_pdf: 国信证券_金融工程专题研究：动量类因子全解析_【发现报告 fxbaogao.com】.pdf
metadata.investment_logic: As A-share institutional participation rises, recent price strength can persist instead of reversing in some stock universes and market states.
metadata.hypothesis: Stocks with stronger cumulative returns over the most recent 20 trading days will have higher short-term future returns.

feedback.implementation: Implemented directly with adjusted close and to_factor_output.
feedback.caveat: The report treats this as a baseline; it may be less robust than path-aware momentum variants.

factor_description: One-year momentum skipping the most recent 20 trading days, with daily limit-up observations excluded from the compounded return.
factor_formulation: Ret240_20_RemoveUpLimit = cumulative return over [T0-260, T0-20] after excluding limit-up daily returns
logic_expression: compound(return_ where return_ < limit_up_threshold over 240-day window ending 20 days ago)

metadata.source_pdf: 国信证券_金融工程专题研究：动量类因子全解析_【发现报告 fxbaogao.com】.pdf
metadata.investment_logic: A-share limit-up episodes can reflect temporary overreaction; excluding limit-up days leaves a cleaner persistent momentum signal.
metadata.hypothesis: Stocks with higher long-horizon cumulative returns after removing limit-up daily returns will have higher future returns.

feedback.implementation: Implemented as compounded shifted log returns over 240 days, skipping 20 days.
feedback.caveat: Limit-up exclusion is approximated with a 9.5% daily close-return threshold because exact limit-up flags are not exposed in the current standard contract.

factor_description: Path-aware momentum using the average cross-sectional rank of daily returns over a 120-day window, skipping the most recent 20 days.

metadata.source_pdf: 国信证券_金融工程专题研究：动量类因子全解析_【发现报告 fxbaogao.com】.pdf
metadata.investment_logic: Persistent daily relative strength is more informative than a return caused by a few extreme days.
metadata.hypothesis: Stocks with consistently higher daily return ranks over the formation window will have higher future returns.

feedback.implementation: Implemented with cross-sectional average ranks and Wright-style standardization.
feedback.caveat: The report excludes new, ST, and suspended stocks during ranking; those filters are not yet represented in FactorFrame.

factor_description: Path smoothness momentum measured by displacement-to-path ratio over 240 trading days, skipping the most recent day.
factor_formulation: Smooth240_1 = cumulative return over [T0-241, T0-1] / sum(abs(daily returns)) over [T0-241, T0-1]

metadata.source_pdf: 国信证券_金融工程专题研究：动量类因子全解析_【发现报告 fxbaogao.com】.pdf
metadata.investment_logic: For the same cumulative return, a smoother path contains less noise and better describes persistent price movement.
metadata.hypothesis: Stocks whose price movement is smoother over the formation window will show different future return behavior than stocks whose movement is jumpy.

feedback.implementation: Implemented as displacement divided by the rolling absolute-return path length.
feedback.caveat: The report observes reversal-like behavior for this raw smoothness measure, so downstream evaluation should respect the lower-is-better direction.

metadata.source_pdf: 国信证券_金融工程专题研究：动量类因子全解析_【发现报告 fxbaogao.com】.pdf
metadata.investment_logic: Overnight price moves can capture information incorporated outside continuous trading hours and may persist over short horizons.
metadata.hypothesis: Stocks with stronger cumulative overnight returns over the past 20 trading days will have higher short-term future returns.

feedback.implementation: Implemented as 20-day rolling sum of log(open / previous close).
feedback.caveat: Uses adjusted open and close; verify provider adjustment consistency before production backtests.
